---
name: Change Task
about: Scoped modification to existing defined behavior. Use feature instead if the "what" is not already decided.
labels: [change, spec-needed]
---

## Summary

<!-- What existing behavior is being changed, and to what? -->

## Current Behavior

<!-- What does it do now? -->

## Desired Behavior

<!-- What should it do instead? Where is this defined or agreed? -->

## Scope

<!-- What is in scope for this change? Keep it narrow. -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- What is explicitly not included? If scope has expanded beyond a known behavior change, reclassify as feature. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Test Strategy

<!-- How will correctness be verified? At minimum: existing tests still pass. -->

-

## Assumptions

<!-- What are you assuming is true? If the "what" is not already decided, stop — this is a feature, not a change. -->

-

## Security Requirements

<!-- Fill in when the change touches auth, permissions, sensitive data, external interfaces, or other security-sensitive scope -->

-

## Dependencies / Blockers

-

## Links

<!-- Link to the spec artifact, wiki page, or decision that defines the current/target behavior -->
